name: Chive Vichyssoise
recipeIngredient: 2 medium All-purpose potatoes (about 1/2 lb), peeled and diced
1 tablespoon Minced fresh or dried chives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, melt the margarine over moderate heat.
2. Add the onion, leek, and celery to the pan. Cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally until the vegetables are tender (about 6-8 minutes). Do not allow them to brown.
3. Add the diced potatoes and stir in the chicken broth. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat to a simmer and cook until the potatoes are tender (approximately 20 minutes).
5. Puree the soup in batches using a blender or food processor, swirling each batch for about 30 seconds.
6. Stir in the buttermilk, chives, lemon juice, and hot red pepper sauce.
7. Cover the soup and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving. If desired, thin the soup with additional cold buttermilk.
